task: put the pink block inside the right cabinet
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white cabinet with an open right door is visible. Inside the cabinet, there is a pink block. The cabinet door is open, providing access to the interior. The pink block is a small, solid object. STRATEGY - First, reach into the cabinet to grasp the pink block. Then, transport it out of the cabinet and place it on the table. Failure modes include not grasping the block, dropping it during transport, or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach into the cabinet to locate the pink block. Step 2: Grasp the pink block with the gripper. Step 3: Transport the block out of the cabinet. Step 4: Place the block on the table.
Goal: on(pink_block, table)
Scene: pink_block, cabinet, table
Step 1: reach(cabinet)
  affordance_region: the interior of the right cabinet door
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: inside(gripper, cabinet) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: inside(gripper, cabinet)
Step 2: grasp(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink block
  contact: holding(pink_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pink_block)
Step 3: transport(pink_block -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table
  spatial: above(pink_block, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pink_block)
  done_when: above(pink_block, table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(pink_block -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table
  contact: surface_contact(pink_block, table) [completion]; released(pink_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(pink_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pink_block, table) AND released(pink_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the interior of the right cabinet door
the body of the pink block
an empty area on the table
an empty area on the table
